text.title: Agentic Workflow, Prompt Patterns, and Gotchas
text.summary: Recommended subagents, prompt templates for tagging and fraud-screening, and failure modes specific to AI-augmented research pipelines.

section.title: Recommended subagents
section.p: research-synthesiser: ingests transcripts and existing tag taxonomy, proposes new tags only when frequency reaches N, emits affinity clusters with quotes. bias-watcher: flags leading questions in moderator scripts before recording starts. recruit-screener: drafts screener questions and grades panel responses for fraud signals.

section.title: Prompt patterns

example.note: Tagging at scale with taxonomy enforcement:
example.code: Given 28 unmoderated session transcripts (file IDs S1..S28) and the tag taxonomy in taxonomy.json, tag every utterance. For each tag with >=5 segments, output a cluster with: definition, 3 verbatim quotes (with timestamp), conflicting evidence if any. Do not invent new tags; if a segment fits none, mark untagged for human review.
Score these 12 screener responses 0-1 for panel-fraud risk (copy-paste, gibberish, suspiciously fast, contradictory answers). Provide reasoning for any score >0.5.

section.reference: Whisper + Anthropic pipeline for transcription and taxonomy tagging

antipattern.description: Auto-summariser compresses a 30-minute interview to one paragraph.
antipattern.reason: Compression loses disconfirming evidence; require quote retention with timestamps for every claim.

antipattern.description: LLM synthetic users used to validate willingness-to-pay or purchase behaviour.
antipattern.reason: Synthetic users are sycophantic and cannot replicate real buying decisions; use them only to seed prompts and edge cases.

antipattern.description: Multi-agent pipeline without idempotency reprocesses the same recording on re-run, double-counting tags.
antipattern.reason: Require deduplication keys (recording ID + run ID) before any tagging write.

antipattern.description: Agent pipelines push transcripts to a repository without PII redaction.
antipattern.reason: GDPR/CCPA require PII redaction before storage; pair with a scrubber agent or equivalent before pushing.

antipattern.description: Diarisation errors mis-attribute moderator speech to participants, biasing tag distributions.
antipattern.reason: Always verify speaker tags before clustering; diarisation accuracy drops on overlapping speech and accents.
